data.title: Nebraska enforces new crypto ATM law to prevent fraud, requiring sufficient warning disclosures
data.description:
Nebraska Governor Jim Pillen signed a new bill into law to combat crypto ATM fraud, aiming to 'build Nebraska into a cryptocurrency leader.'
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/346045/nebraska-enforces-new-crypto-atm-law-to-prevent-fraud-requiring-sufficient-warning-disclosures?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Nebraska implements new law requiring cryptocurrency ATMs to provide fraud warnings
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Nebraska has begun enforcing new cryptocurrency ATM regulations, requiring these devices to provide users with clear anti-fraud warnings before transactions. According to The Block, these warnings must be presented in written or electronic form and are intended to prevent users from making potentially fraudulent transactions without knowing it.
The regulations will take effect on March 13, 2025 and apply to all cryptocurrency ATMs operating in Nebraska. Operators must ensure that users read and confirm these warnings before transactions. The move is intended to raise public awareness of the potential risks of cryptocurrency transactions and reduce the occurrence of fraud.
(The Block)

data.title: Financial disclosures show six members of Trump’s cabinet hold Bitcoin assets
data.description:
Six of President Trump's 22 cabinet members listed Bitcoin wallets or indirectly held cryptocurrencies through other financial instruments in their January financial disclosures.
The six officials are:
Robert Kennedy Jr., Secretary of Health and Human Services
Russell Vought, Director of the Office of Management and Budget
Tulsi Gabbard, Director of National Intelligence
Pete Hegseth, Secretary of Defense
Scott Bessent, Secretary of the Treasury
Sean Duffy, Secretary of Transportation
The financial disclosure reflects the rising influence of crypto assets in the top ranks of the U.S. government, and the market is paying attention to the future cryptocurrency policy trends of the Trump administration.
(Fortune)

data.title: VeChain Executive Urges Education to Overcome Bitcoin Reserve Bill Hurdles
data.description:
Johnny Garcia emphasizes education on Bitcoin reserve bills as key to overcoming legislative resistance, with 18 states still considering adoption.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/vechain-executive-urges-education-to-overcome-bitcoin-reserve-bill-hurdles

data.title: U.S. Congressman says the Bitcoin Act will not infringe individuals from owning BTC
data.description:
US Congressman Nick Begich clarified that the Bitcoin Act did not infringe on private Bitcoin ownership. He added that Bitcoin protected the rights of individuals and businesses to own, hold and transact Bitcoin freely.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-act-will-not-infringe-individuals/

data.title: Newly created wallet withdraws 2.4 million OM from Binance, worth $15.48 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created wallet withdrew 2.4 million OMs from Binance, worth approximately US$15.48 million.

data.title: Megabit will launch VIC/USDT 1-75x perpetual contract
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Megabit will launch VIC/USDT 1-75x perpetual contract at 18:00 (SGT TIME) on March 13, 2025.

data.title: Europe Leads Global Crypto Banking with 55 Friendly Banks
data.description:
Europe dominates crypto banking with 55 friendly banks, driven by MiCA regulations, while challenges like fraud and AML rules test its leading position.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/europe-leads-global-crypto-banking-with-55-friendly-banks

data.title: Babylon Foundation: Airdrop registration deadline extended to March 19
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Babylon Foundation posted on the X platform that given that many users have only recently been able to register for the airdrop, the airdrop registration deadline will be extended by 4 days to 8 am UTC on March 19.

data.title: Gate.io launches EPIC perpetual contract, supporting up to 50x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io will launch EPIC perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement) at 16:00 (UTC+8) on March 13, supporting 1-50 times leverage.
